detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ExchangeWhitelist.trade(address,uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,address,uint8,bytes32,bytes32,uint256) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#335-385):
	External calls:
	- feeMake = DVIP(dvipAddress).feeFor(feeMakeExporter,msg.sender,1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#355)
	- feeTake = DVIP(dvipAddress).feeFor(feeTakeExporter,user,1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#357)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- feeTake = DVIP(dvipAddress).feeFor(feeTakeExporter,user,1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#357)
	- feeTerm = safeMul(amount,((1000000000000000000) - feeMake)) / (1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#361)
	- feeTerm = safeMul(amount,feeMake) / (1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#365)
	- feeTerm = safeMul(amountSell,amount) / amountBuy (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#369)
	- feeTerm = safeMul(safeMul(((1000000000000000000) - feeTake),amountSell),amount) / amountBuy / (1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#373)
	- feeTerm = safeMul(safeMul(feeTake,amountSell),amount) / amountBuy / (1000000000000000000) (ExchangeWhitelist.sol#377)
